title: Registration Deadline Extended
description: The ECI has extended the deadline for online registration to ensure all eligible citizens can participate.

title: How to verify your name online
description: Check the official Electoral Roll to verify your polling booth and voter serial number.

title: New Form 6 Guidance
description: Minor changes to the Form 6 submission process for faster digital processing.

title: Aadhaar Linking Benefits
description: Linking your Aadhaar with Voter ID helps in faster e-KYC and identity verification.

title: Booth Relocation in District 4
description: Some polling booths in District 4 have been moved to larger community halls for better accessibility.
